content: GitHub REST API v3 endpoints for this phase: (1) POST /orgs/{org}/teams - body: {name: str, privacy: 'closed'|'secret'} - response 201 includes slug field - errors: 422 (already exists or validation failed), 403 (forbidden). (2) POST /orgs/{org}/repos - body: {name: str, private: bool=false, auto_init: bool=false} - response 201 includes clone_url, html_url - errors: 422 (exists/spammed), 403 (forbidden). (3) PUT /orgs/{org}/teams/{team_slug}/memberships/{username} - body: {role: 'member'|'maintainer'} - response 200 with {url, role, state} or 422 (org can't be added to team). (4) DELETE /orgs/{org}/teams/{team_slug}/memberships/{username} - response 204 no content, 403 if team sync configured. Auth: Authorization: Bearer {PAT} header with classic PAT requiring write:org + repo scopes. Fine-grained PATs have organization permission gaps (team management returns 403/empty) - classic PAT recommended for PoC.
